steps.title: Interpret the input
steps.content: The variable $x$ is the number of years after the end of $1959$. When $x=5$, the time is the end of $1964$.

steps.title: Interpret the output
steps.content: The function value $f(x)$ is the account value in dollars. So $f(5)$ being approximately $265$ means the estimated account value is about $265$ dollars at the end of $1964$. The answer is D.
